extraInfo.name: 机械师角色测试
extraInfo.description: 这是机械师测试的蓝图。需要角色编辑器才能放下去，建议测试阵地的时候使用，不要在正常的游戏流程使用，仅供模组开发快速测试使用。
extraInfo.author: 白金trigger

description.default: 这是机械师测试的蓝图。需要角色编辑器才能放下去，建议测试阵地的时候使用，不要在正常的游戏流程使用，仅供模组开发快速测试使用。
description.zh-CN: 这是机械师测试的蓝图。需要角色编辑器才能放下去，建议测试阵地的时候使用，不要在正常的游戏流程使用，仅供模组开发快速测试使用。

1|102876**NoBeard*NoTattoo_Face*NoTattoo_Body*0*0.965122*ReimplantXenogerm:FoamSpray:Coagulate:Bloodfeed:Longjump*3F-33-26-FF*Astropolitan*下潜-神圣派*[ludeon.rimworld|ludeon.rimworld.royalty|ludeon.rimworld.biotech|ludeon.rimworld.odyssey|ludeon.rimworld.anomaly|ludeon.rimworld.ideology]***Female_NarrowPointy*Baseliner*传奇射手*Deathless:Ageless:DiseaseFree:XenogermReimplanter:PerfectImmunity:TotalHealing:ArchiteMetabolism:VacuumResistance_Total:FoamSpray:Hemogenic:Coagulate:Bloodfeeder:LongjumpLegs:WoundHealing_SuperFast:Superclotting:MoveSpeed_VeryQuick:Mood_Sanguine:MinTemp_LargeDecrease:MaxTemp_LargeIncrease:FireResistant:Aggression_DeadCalm:MeleeDamage_Strong:KillThirst:Robust:Pain_Reduced:Beauty_Beautiful:StrongStomach:Learning_Slow:DarkVision:Inbred:Instability_Major:Unstoppable:Tail_Smooth:AptitudeRemarkable_Shooting:AptitudeRemarkable_Melee:AptitudeTerrible_Construction:AptitudeTerrible_Mining:AptitudeTerrible_Cooking:AptitudeTerrible_Plants:AptitudeTerrible_Animals:AptitudeTerrible_Crafting:AptitudeTerrible_Artistic:AptitudeRemarkable_Medicine:AptitudeTerrible_Social:AptitudeTerrible_Intellectual:ChemicalDependency_GoJuice:ChemicalDependency_WakeUp***FF-FF-FF-FF***DarkReddish

pawn.name: 机械辅兵 1
pawn.data: 机械辅兵 1*Mech_Militor*新移民|PlayerColony*机械辅兵 1*104414656*-3704593224*0***0*****FF-FF-FF-FF*FF-FF-FF-FF*-1*FF-FF-FF-FF*FF-FF-FF-FF*FF-FF-FF-FF******Firefighter|0:Patient|0:Doctor|0:PatientBedRest|0:BasicWorker|0:Warden|0:Handling|0:Cooking|0:Hunting|0:Construction|0:Growing|0:Mining|0:PlantCutting|0:Smithing|0:Tailoring|0:Art|0:Crafting|0:Hauling|0:Cleaning|0:Research|0:Childcare|0:DarkStudy|0:Fishing|0*Gun_MiniShotgun||FF-FF-FF-FF|0|1|100***Kills|0:KillsHumanlikes|0:KillsAnimals|0:KillsMechanoids|0:PawnsDowned|0:PawnsDownedHumanlikes|0:PawnsDownedAnimals|0:PawnsDownedMechanoids|0:ShotsFired|0:Headshots|0:DamageDealt|0:DamageTaken|0:TimesInMentalState|0:TimesOnFire|0:FiresExtinguished|0:OperationsReceived|0:OperationsPerformed|0:TimesTendedTo|0:TimesTendedOther|0:PeopleCaptured|0:PrisonersRecruited|0:PrisonersChatted|0:AnimalsTamed|0:AnimalsSlaughtered|0:MealsCooked|0:ThingsConstructed|0:ThingsInstalled|0:ThingsRepaired|0:ThingsCrafted|0:ThingsHauled|0:PlantsSown|0:PlantsHarvested|0:CellsMined|0:MessesCleaned|0:ResearchPointsResearched|0:CorpsesBuried|0:NutritionEaten|0:BodiesStripped|0:ThingsUninstalled|0:ThingsDeconstructed|0:ArtifactsActivated|0:ContainersOpened|0:SwitchesFlicked|0:TimeAsColonistOrColonyAnimal|14640:TimeAsQuestLodger|0:TimeAsPrisoner|0:TimeInBed|0:TimeInBedForMedicalReasons|0:TimeDowned|0:TimeGettingFood|0:TimeGettingJoy|0:TimeUnderRoof|0:TimeDrafted|4720:TimeOnFire|0:TimeInMentalState|0:TimeHauling|0:TimeHandlingAnimals|0:TimeFirefighting|0:TimeWardening|0:TimeHunting|0:TimeConstructing|0:TimeTreatingAndFeeding|0:TimeResearching|0:TimeCleaning|0:TimeRepairing|0:TimeMining|0:TimeSowingAndHarvesting|0:TimeAsChildInColony|0:KillsEntities|0:PawnsDownedEntities|0*MechEnergy|0.4781988***Overseer|Gil?机械师?Durnin|95139*****0*0**FF-FF-FF-FF***[ludeon.rimworld.biotech]*********FF-FF-FF-FF***
